entry.title: PFM data to the S4HANA
entry.content:
We are using the PFM application on our BTP. We would like to load the calculated data from PFM into the S4HANA system. It seems it is not possible yet. Can you confirm this thesis? If it not possible yet, do you know when the feature will be released. And is there any other workarounds?

Thank you in advance

Best Natalja

entry.title: Energy consumed information in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to build a report on energy consumed by the enterprise. Could one of the experts here guide me is such information is stored in S/4HANA? Would it be available under EHS?

Please advise.

Thanks

Vinayak

entry.title: How to access Model Table in CPE environment of SCT
entry.content:
I created a custom environment in CPE and used python function of PaPM to call Clustering Algorithm. I am able to store the results in the Model Table. But I am not able to use this model table as a source for custom metrics in SCT catalog.

1. Does SCT currently support these custom models/objects from CPE as a source for custom metrics in SCT?

2. Is there any way that I can access CPE objects in SAC or access backend "Y tables" to connect with SAC for dashboarding?

entry.title: Getting 'Error Code 403' while trying to configure master data in SAP sustainability control tower
entry.content:
(1) Roles assigned my user ID

SUS_SCT_Administrator

SUS_SCT_DataManager

SUS_SCT_Reader

SUS_SCT_Sustainability_Metrics_Catalogue_Reader

SUS_SCT_Sustainability_Metrics_Catalogue_Configuration_Manager

SUS_SCT_Sustainability_Metrics_Catalogue_Data_Manager

(2) I completed CPE import and updated successfully in SAP SCT.

(3) I am getting 403 error when I am trying to [SCT Installation and configuration > SCT configuration > Configure Master Data] configure master data

Error code 403 Forbidden. You don't have permissions to view this page'

entry.title: Integration of ISNET world ( ISN contractor and supplier information management) with SAP
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any standard integration (API) of SAP available for ISNET world ( ISN contractor and supplier information management) ?

I have checked the API business hub / Business Accelerator Hub and there are no existing APIs for integration.

Do anyone know whether there is a future plan in roadmap from SAP to address this or is there any existing integration done by consultant so far ?

entry.title: Datasphere integration for SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hi,

When going through the roadmap and the SAP Documentation for the SAP Sustainability Control Tower, I saw that Datasphere would become a valid integration option for delivering SAP SCT data. Does anyone know whether this integration solution is already live for tenants or whether it will be included in the Q3 Release as described in the roadmap?

Kind regards,

Cas

entry.title: Fail to update CPE Packages SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hi,

I just accessed our newly created SAP SCT Tenant. It seems like the automatic update of CPE Packages keeps on failing. When loading the update package manually, I can find the following error message in the monitor...

Activation of Function=MTCOK failed

All other Function activations worked properly.

entry.title: SFM demo version
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know the main steps to use the transportation data in SFM demo version.

I have already uploaded some data with shipments but on the manage calculation errors app I have the message "Queued for leg creation".

Thanks,

Miguel Baptista.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Content on SAP SCT
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP PaPM content packages for ESRS and Climate pricing are available for download on the help page. This content comes with pre build data and models as well. We were able to download this content and import to SCT. I had a few queries as below.

1. What would be the implications of having the climate content from PaPM in SCT? Would there be any issues with the backend models or KPIs?

2. If not, then why not have PaPM content in SCT itself

I am still very unclear how the packages worked in SCT. Please do advise. I can add further information if I have been unclear.

Thanks in advance

Vinayak

entry.title: Connecting S/4HANA Advanced Financial Close with SAP ESG suite of products
entry.content:
Greetings !

I am planning to connect AFC with SCT(and other ESG applications). Have you seen that happening before/now or planning for future? If you have seen or doing any discovery, would be good to know how fruitful can it be?

Kr,

Debashish

entry.title: SAP Datasphere consume SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content: Is it possible for SAP Datasphere to consume data from SAP Sustainability Control Tower? Right now SCT can consume data from DSP.

entry.title: How to license SAP Sustainability Footprint Management (metrics)?
entry.content: How to license SAP Sustainability Footprint Management?

entry.title: Load data from SAP Datasphere to SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hello!! SAP SCT has an ODatav4 type inbound api that allows data to be loaded using post methods. How can I use it from SAP DSP? I have tried to create an OData v4 connection but it gives me the error code 405 method not allowed.

This is the API Overview | Push Data into Data Provider Interfaces (DPIs) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: SFM - Transport Footprint
entry.content:
Hi, as announced on the What´s new for SFM the Transport footprint calculation should be visible on the Manage Footprint Results app. It is not available on my system demo. Also when creating the inventory scope it should be available the transport value chain step to select but it is not yet.

Do we have to change something ?

My tenant is:

valantic-sustainability-atzxcc9a.eu20

Thanks,

Best regards,

Miguel Baptista.

entry.title: CO2 in Purchase requisition
entry.content:
We have created Footprint data:

But it is 0 in:

Why?

In S/4 on premise 2022 SPS02

entry.title: Visual Modeler SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
How do I use the SAP SCT graphical modeler to create advanced metrics?

I have seen that it is the same as the SAP PaPM graphical modeler but I can't find information on how it works.

The documentation on how to create advanced metrics doesn't help me much. Step-By-Step Description of Constructing Example Advanced Metric - Carbon Emission Intensity | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Sustainability Control Tower - Remove persisted company code
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have by mistake persisted company codes in a wrong format and now I have 2 sets of company codes in the system. I would like to delete the ones with format SE01 - and keep the ones with format SE001. 

Is this possible? How can correct the data?

Thanks for help!

entry.title: Issue during getting ESG metrics under SCT API instance created under Netherland's datacenter
entry.content:
Hi,

We have SCT service broker(API) instance created and we are trying to retrieve a list of metrics using OData mention on Business Accelerator Hub.
And During this we are getting below response

{
    "message": "tenant unknown",
    "status": 400
}
Can any one help to resolve this

entry.title: Spain: Contribution RAP to SCRAP ("Punto verde")
entry.content:
Hi, I’m looking for guidance or examples on how others have implemented sustainability contributions (like Punto Verde) on customer invoices. How to ensure that the RAP to SCRAP contribution is distinctly identifiable from other charges while adhering to Spanish waste management laws (Royal Decree 1055/2022) and ENVALORA compliance?

Any insights into best practices, configuration suggestions, or technical solutions would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Use of Business functions LOG_MM_SUSTAIN_1 in S4F
entry.content:
Dear All

Need information on what are the functionalities enabled by following business functions in ECC 6.0 and does it need to be activated in S4F or in S4F the functionalities provided by these are covered somewhere else.

  1. LOG_MM_SUSTAIN_1
  2. LOG_MM_ANALYTICS_1
